description: CompositionGreen and black checked shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, spread collar, front buttoned placket, patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash at 40 degreesWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachTumble dry normal or line dryWarm ironAdd a work wear inspired element to your off-duty wardrobe with this shirt from a label loved for its structured tailoring - highlander. Style this with a leather jacket and form fitting denims to turn heads at upscale weekend dos. Alternatively, you can also wear this with your favourite jeans and casual shoes.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
